ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., glass, metal, cloth) */,
  "item_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item (e.g., common, rare, epic) */,
  "production_time" INTEGER /* Time required to produce the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the item's image */,
  "item_price" INTEGER /* Base price of the item in the game */,
  "item_availability" INTEGER /* Whether the item is currently available for crafting */,
  "item_release_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was released in the game */,
  "item_last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the item's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., material, currency) */,
  "resource_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the resource (e.g., grams, units) */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "resource_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the resource's image */,
  "resource_price" INTEGER /* Base price of the resource in the game */,
  "resource_availability" INTEGER /* Whether the resource is currently available */,
  "resource_release_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was released in the game */,
  "resource_last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the resource's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_resources" (
  "item_resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item-resource pair */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource required */,
  "resource_price" INTEGER /* Price of the resource required for the item */,
  "resource_availability" INTEGER /* Whether the resource is available for the item */,
  "resource_usage_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of resource usage in crafting the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_resources_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_resources_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_requirements" (
  "item_requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item-requirement pair */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the requirement (e.g., crafting level, skill level) */,
  "requirement_value" INTEGER /* Value of the requirement */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the requirement */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of the requirement (e.g., skill, level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_requirements_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crafting_processes" (
  "crafting_process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crafting process */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the crafting process */,
  "process_description" TEXT /* Description of the crafting process */,
  "process_steps" TEXT /* Detailed steps of the crafting process */,
  "process_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image or diagram of the process */,
  "process_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video tutorial of the process */,
  "process_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the process (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crafting_process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crafting_processes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crafting_levels" (
  "crafting_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crafting level */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the crafting level */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Description of the crafting level */,
  "level_requirements" TEXT /* Detailed requirements to reach this level */,
  "level_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the level */,
  "level_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video tutorial for reaching this level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crafting_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crafting_levels_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "skill_description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "skill_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the skill */,
  "skill_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video tutorial for the skill */,
  "skill_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the skill (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_skills" (
  "item_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item-skill pair */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_skills_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, game master) */,
  "user_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crafting_sessions" (
  "crafting_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crafting session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being crafted */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the crafting session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the crafting session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the crafting session */,
  "session_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the session */,
  "session_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crafting_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crafting_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crafting_sessions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crafting_results" (
  "crafting_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crafting result */,
  "crafting_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crafting session */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the crafting session (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message about the crafting result */,
  "result_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the result */,
  "result_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crafting_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crafting_results_crafting_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("crafting_session_id") REFERENCES crafting_sessions ("crafting_session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_crafting_data" (
  "item_crafting_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item's crafting data */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "charcoal_per_item" INTEGER /* Amount of charcoal required per item */,
  "flax_per_item" INTEGER /* Amount of flax required per item */,
  "pappy_per_item" INTEGER /* Amount of pappy required per item */,
  "silk_cloth_per_item" REAL /* Amount of silk cloth required per item */,
  "cuttable_gems_per_item" REAL /* Amount of cuttable gems required per item */,
  "total_cost" INTEGER /* Total cost of crafting the item */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin of the item */,
  "crafting_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the crafting process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_crafting_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_crafting_data_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)
